notes: A real interactive curses C program gets identical keycodes from the native libncurses_cabi as from libncursesw: cabi getch wires the ncurses-terminal RawMode + Keys (over fd 0) to the byte-exact KeyMap decoder, and cbreak/keypad/noecho set it up. Together with the NCURSES.CURSES drawing court this makes the C-ABI a complete input+output curses drop-in for the courted surface.
oracle_method: compile one curses C program (initscr/keypad/cbreak/getch) twice -- linked to libncurses_cabi.a and to libncursesw -- and feed each byte sequence over a raw xterm pty, comparing the keycodes returned
